-Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -fPIC -Wall -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/animation.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libanimation.so -o libanimation.so
